findings.summary: Live GUI coverage still validates only a Destroyer/Frigate narrow-width case and does not exercise the large-ship split-layout scenario that previously clipped at the right edge.

test_sufficiency_summary: Source-contract coverage is strong and verifier reruns passed with OK (153 tests) and OK (36 tests), but live GUI coverage still lacks the plan-requested large-ship split-mode runtime case.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: UsersGuide and DesignNotes now match the implemented split/stack behavior, preserved resize seam, and current validated totals.
